replacements.description: As CARDNAME enters, you lose life equal to your life total.
You don't lose the game for having 0 or less life.
If you would gain life, draw that many cards instead.

triggers.description: Whenever you're dealt damage, sacrifice that many nontoken permanents. If you can't, you lose the game.
When CARDNAME is put into a graveyard from the battlefield, you lose the game.
